channel.title: The GT Collective Journal
channel.description: Detailing education, ceramic coating guidance, paint correction notes, and preservation advice from The GT Collective in Leonardtown, MD.

item.title: Is Ceramic Coating Worth It for Southern Maryland Drivers?
item.description: When ceramic coating makes sense, why correction comes first, and how Leonardtown drivers should think about long-term paint protection.

item.title: Paint Correction vs Paint Polishing
item.description: A plain-language guide to swirl marks, haze, water etching, machine polishing, and what can realistically improve.

item.title: Why Undercarriage Preservation Matters Here
item.description: Road salt, coastal air, rural roads, and moisture all attack the underside first. Here is what lanolin preservation does and does not do.
